'''DS-29-4''' was the [[Callsign/Legends|call sign]] of a [[TIE pilot]] who served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] by<ref name="CSWE" /> [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]. In that [[Standard year/Legends|year]], the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] occurred,<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> during which [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] attempted to destroy the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|DS-1 Orbital Battle Station]].<ref name="ANH">{{Film|IV}}</ref> DS-29-4 was among the [[TIE series/Legends|TIE]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] who participated in the battle,<ref name="CSWE" /> which saw numerous Imperial [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] trying to defend the [[Battle station/Legends|battle station]] from the Alliance starfighters. Ultimately, the Battle of Yavin ended with an Imperial defeat when the Rebel starfighters destroyed the [[Space station/Legends|space station]].<ref name="ANH" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:DS294-ANH.png|thumb|right|250px|The ''A New Hope'' TIE fighter which was identified by the ''Battle of Yavin'' set of the ''Star Wars Trading Card Game'' as DS-29-4, though previously it was identified as DS-61-9 in the ''A New Hope'' expansion set]]
DS-29-4's name was coined in [[2003]] for a card in the [[Battle of Yavin (TCG)|''Battle of Yavin'']] expansion set of the ''[[Star Wars Trading Card Game]]''. While the card attaches the DS-29-4 name to a TIE/LN starfighter,<ref name="TCG">{{TCG|set=Battle of Yavin|cardname=TIE Fighter DS-29-4|link=https://swtcg.com/Content/Images/Cards/BOY/TIE_Fighter_DS_29_4.webp?v=2}}</ref> [[2008]]'s ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' would later identify DS-29-4 as the pilot.<ref name="CSWE" /> This article assumes that the latter source is correct.

A further discrepancy exists surrounding the exact identity of DS-29-4. The card used by the ''Star Wars Trading Card Game'' to represent DS-29-4<ref name="TCG" /> is a screenshot from the [[1977]] [[original trilogy]] film [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']] of a TIE/LN starfighter destroyed by [[Rebel pilot/Legends|Rebel pilot]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]].<ref name="ANH" /> However, [[2002]]'s [[A New Hope (TCG)|''A New Hope'']] expansion set previously used an image of the same starfighter to represent [[DS-61-9]], another name designated as the starfighter,<ref name="TCG2">{{TCG|set=A New Hope|cardname=TIE Fighter DS-61-9|link=https://swtcg.com/Content/Images/Cards/ANH/TIE_Fighter_DS_61_9.webp?v=2}}</ref> before ''The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia'' also designated that as the pilot's call sign.<ref name="CSWE2">{{CSWECite|I|212|DS-61-9}}</ref> This article treats both DS-61-9 and DS-29-4 as separate TIE pilots and avoids linking either of the pilots to the fighter shown in ''A New Hope''.
